series_metadata.series_title: Reorganization, Layoff, and Job Abolishment Files
series_metadata.series_description: Contains documentation supporting layoff, job abolishment, and/or reorganizations within ODM. Documentation may consist of initial proposals, justification for proposed action(s); approval correspondence from other entities as required (Office of Collective Bargaining).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office and ; Electronic: in office and
